results.rendered_html: ayatna (3. a + ya˚) m. Nichtanstrengung: ayatnena, ayatnāt oder ayatnatas ohne Anstrengung, ohne Mühe: tadavāpnotyayatnena  M. 5,47 .  HIT. 38,18 . ayatnādāgataṃ rājyam  R. 2,85,12 . nidhiṃ labdhamayatnataḥ  KATHĀS. 19,38 . ayatnaja  H. 509 .

results.rendered_html:
ayatna a. Not requiring any effort; ˚paṭavāsatāṃ  R. 4. 55. 
— tnaḥ Absence of effort or exertion; ayatnena, -tnāt,
— tnataḥ without effort or exertion, easily, readily.
Comp.
— kārin a. making no effort or exertion, indifferent; idle.
— kṛta, -ja a. easily produced, spontaneous.
— labhya a. easily obtainable;  Bh. 3. 10.
